hooks.prompt: Review what just happened in the conversation. Did the agent make a design decision, discover a constraint, choose a pattern, learn something non-obvious, or produce context that would help another agent on this project? Only consider things NOT already in the code — the 'why', not the 'what'. Respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Brief description of what should be written to Seam"} if there is something worth sharing, or {"decision": "approve"} if not.
